description: Blinded FULL 7-year manifest dataset for hacker-persona prioritization. All 175 critical/high events from the canonical Spring/Java manifest (data/seven-year-manifest-events.json), with all outcome fields and all NP+DI filter-label fields stripped. The hacker is NOT being told which events are NP+DI — they should rank purely from vulnerability mechanics. The hidden purpose: this measures whether the hacker's tiers can serve as a SAFETY NET for events that the NP+DI filter rejects but that actually got exploited.
